basic_details.job_title: CARI Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Yoga Therapist and Project Technical Support II Posts
basic_details.post_name: Yoga Therapist and Project Technical Support II

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age relaxable in the case of SC/ST/OBC/P.W. etc. as per Govt. of India Rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree in Yoga or Yoga & Naturopathy, Diploma in Yoga, 12th Science + MLT/DMLT Diploma, Graduate degree in relevant subject
qualification.details: Yoga Therapist: Degree in Yoga or Yoga & Naturopathy with min 55% marks from recognized University + 2 years experience OR Any Graduate + Diploma in Yoga (1 year) with 55% marks + 5 years practical experience; Level II (Therapy level) Certificate of YCB; Demonstration skills in Yogic practices (skill test) Project Technical Support II: 12th in science + Diploma (MLT/DMLT/Equivalent) + 5 years experience OR 3 years graduate degree in relevant subject + 2 years experience

salary_details.details: Yoga Therapist - Rs.38,000 per month consolidated Project Technical Support II - Rs.20,000+ HRA (ie.4000/-)= Rs.24000/- per month.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for CARI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the CARI Recruitment 2026 is scheduled to be held on 29th June 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Yoga Therapist and Project Technical Support II posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced by CARI for the positions of Yoga Therapist and Project Technical Support II.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Yoga Therapist post?
faq.answer: For the Yoga Therapist post, candidates need a Degree in Yoga or Yoga & Naturopathy with min 55% marks and 2 years experience, or a Graduate degree with a 1-year Diploma in Yoga and 5 years experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the posts announced by CARI?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts is 30 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC/P.W. candidates as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for these contractual positions?
faq.answer: The consolidated monthly salary for these positions ranges from Rs. 24,000 to Rs. 38,000.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for CARI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for CARI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Walk-in Interview and a Skill Test to assess the candidates' suitability for the roles.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview for CARI Recruitment 2026 going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the Central Ayurveda Research Institute (CARI) office in Bhubaneswar, Odisha (Pin code: 751029).

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: No, these positions are contractual in nature, as indicated in the job type.
